details: Change engine oil and filter. Check Intelligent Oil-Life Monitor status.
Rotate tires to ensure even wear and prolong tire life.
Inspect brake pads, rotors, and fluid levels. Replace if necessary.
Replace the cabin air filter to maintain air quality inside the vehicle.
Replace engine air filter to maintain optimal fuel efficiency and engine performance.
Replace spark plugs to ensure smooth engine operation and prevent misfires.
Flush and replace transmission fluid for long-term transmission health.
applicable_models: All Ford Models with Automatic Transmission

details: Flush and replace engine coolant to prevent overheating and corrosion.
Inspect the specialized cooling system for the high-voltage battery pack.
8-year/100,000-mile warranty for high-voltage battery and associated components.
